title: Aureline mic-state contract
description: Boundary schema for mic_state_record entries frozen in docs/auth/device_permission_and_capture_boundary_contract.md. The record powers the persistent mic-state pill/strip shown while capture is possible, active, processing, awaiting confirmation, unavailable, or policy blocked. It carries actor/surface attribution, processing-locus disclosure, transcript review/correction affordances, retention/export disclosure, and safe stop/mute actions. Raw audio bytes, raw transcript bodies, raw URLs, raw device identifiers, and raw credential material never cross this boundary.

mic_state_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this mic-state contract. Bump only on breaking payload changes.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape.

instance_schema_hint.description: Optional $schema pointer carried on worked fixtures.

fixture_metadata.description: Optional worked-example prelude carried on fixtures.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable id safe for logs, RPC, and export/support packets. Raw device identifiers, raw URLs, raw transcripts, and raw credential material never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic or authoritative clock source.

export_safe_label.description: Short label safe for UI, logs, support exports, and admin exports. Raw audio, raw transcripts, raw URLs, raw device identifiers, and raw secret material MUST NOT appear.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short reviewable sentence safe for product copy and export. Must not embed raw URLs, raw transcripts, or raw credential material.

surface_redaction_class.description: Product-surface redaction class used by settings, auth, support, admin, and evidence records.

actor_class.description: Actor-class vocabulary reused across auth, capture, and consent surfaces.

device_class.description: Mic-state records describe microphone capture. Other device kinds use their own state pills.

mic_state_class.description: Closed mic-state vocabulary. idle = capture off; listening = actively capturing; muted = user stopped/muted; processing = capture ended and processing is ongoing; needs_confirmation = awaiting preview/confirmation for a privileged voice action; unavailable = device/OS unavailable; policy_blocked = explicitly blocked by policy.

processing_locus_class.description: Closed processing-locus vocabulary for mic-state disclosure.

retention_posture_class.description: Closed retention posture vocabulary for mic-state disclosure.

action_class.description: Closed action vocabulary for safe user-facing mic-state affordances.

command_id_ref.description: Optional canonical command id ref the host uses to invoke this action. Embedded surfaces cannot mint command ids.

route_ref.description: Optional opaque route ref or deep-link anchor. Never a raw URL.

action_affordance.description: User-facing affordance bound to a mic-state pill.

initiated_by_user.description: True only when the session was user-initiated (push-to-talk, explicit toggle). False for implicit/extension/policy initiated capture attempts.

mic_state_actor.description: Actor and surface attribution for mic-state.

processing_locus_disclosure.description: Pre-capture disclosure of where processing happens.

policy_block_context.description: Optional policy context that explains policy_blocked states without exposing raw policy bundle bytes.

state_label.description: Export-safe label shown on the mic-state pill. Recommended stable labels: Idle, Listening, Muted, Processing, Needs confirmation, Unavailable, Policy blocked.

state_note.description: Short note that explains the current mic state without leaking raw transcript or content.

device_permission_row_ref.description: Optional ref to the corresponding device_permission_row_record for this capture session or capability.

voice_mode_session_ref.description: Optional ref to a voice-mode session (when the mic state is driven by voice/dictation).

transcript_correction_path_ref.description: Optional ref to the transcript correction/review path when a transcript is expected.

mic_state_record.description: Persistent mic-state indicator shown while capture is possible or active.
